headline: Roper Technologies, Inc. (ROP) Announces Dividend of $0.91 Per Share
summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROP) is among the 10 Most Oversold S&P 500 Stocks So Far in 2026. On May 19, the company said that its Board of Directors had approved a dividend of $0.91 per share. The payment is scheduled for July 22, 2026, to all shareholders of record as of July 8, 2026. The […]
